description: Mobile-first classic Hangman word-guessing game. SVG gallows reveals one body part per wrong guess (head/body/arms/legs). 6 wrong guesses ends the round. On-screen A-Z keyboard with correct (green) / incorrect (red) coloring; tap a letter to guess. Tracks streak and best-streak in localStorage. 100-word default vocabulary. Fully Lego-composed: imports entities.hangman-game verbatim. mob-001..016 mobile wisdom applied.
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.hangman. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of HangmanGame + HANGMAN_DEFAULT_WORDS (verbatim, marker present), (2) SVG gallows with 6 body parts revealed by wrongCount via data-step + .show class, (3) A-Z on-screen keyboard with disabled state for guessed letters + green/red correct/incorrect coloring, (4) reveal-pop animation on newly-revealed letters, (5) streak + best-streak persistence via localStorage, (6) end-of-round overlay (won/lost variants) with the hidden word reveal, (7) keyboard-key (desktop) + pointerup (mobile) input parity, (8) 100-word default vocabulary. Clean disambiguation via antiKeywords from wordle/squaredle/crossword/anagram (neighboring word-game genres).

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to fill the Hangman genre gap. Composes recipe.hangman's required Lego (entities.hangman-game). Clean SVG gallows + green/red keyboard color cues. AntiKeywords disambiguate from wordle/squaredle/crossword/anagram.
